'''Ghost spiders''', also spelled '''ghost spydrs''', were a shelled, clawed [[spydr]] species found in the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]] on the planet [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. With some growing to the size of houses, the poisonous [[Spider/Legends|arachnids]] spun webs whose strands were stronger than steel.<ref>''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'';'' ''[[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]''</ref>

They were considered a delicacy in many cultures. The [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]], who valued the taste of the creatures, ate only the legs. To safely work with the animals, many Kubaz ranchers required regular injections to develop an immunity to the beasts' powerful and fatal poison.
